response.justification: Strong individual contributor with 13+ years of software development across diverse stacks, but the resume shows no formal people-management experience, no engineering manager titles, and no demonstrated work on developer tools, build systems, or testing infrastructure at scale. The role explicitly requires 2 years of people management and 3 years building developer tools — neither is evidenced. Mobile-platform ecosystem experience is also minimal (one Apple TV/iOS stint a decade ago).
strengths: 13+ years of software development experience, exceeding the 8-year minimum
Strong testing/TDD background including workshops, Selenium courses, and a custom D test runner (Trial)
Some adjacent tooling work: CI/CD setup, GitLab administration, MCP code generators, and dev-ops infrastructure
concerns: No people-management or team-leadership role evidenced — all titles are IC (Developer/Senior/Staff Engineer)
No substantive experience with compilers, build systems, or large-scale test automation infrastructure
Minimal mobile-platform ecosystem exposure; no evidence of leading organizational change
